tweets.text:
🔥 Wildfires are burning longer, moving faster, and behaving less predictably than ever.
 
So far this year, over 2.3 million acres have burned nationwide and FEMA has approved 21 Fire Management Assistance Grants (FMAGs). Just this week, we approved two of those grants. 🧵⬇️ https://t.co/44yEIOQEtJ
